textByHash.db03563d39cbcc198a59fbea3c40603d5bb00017: Thou hast me in thine control. So that I mayst return from whence I came, I must grant thee a boon. What dost thou wish of me?
textByHash.c3be8a04ca4e65f68815a1e6372f208d42e1ac8e: The deed is done. Thou mayst now shatter Merlin's crystal with Excalibur, and I can once more rest. Begone! And leave me once more in peace.
